display.label: GCP Project ID
display.description: Google Cloud project ID. If not specified, uses the default from the environment.

display.label: Message Ordering Enabled
display.description: Enable message ordering to preserve order within a single ordering key. Default: true

display.label: Ordering Key
display.description: Custom ordering key to use for all messages. If not specified, uses the record key.

display.label: Null Key Value
display.description: Ordering key to use when the record key is null. Default: default

display.label: Batch Delay Threshold (ms)
display.description: Maximum delay threshold in milliseconds for batching messages. Default: 100

display.label: Batch Element Count Threshold
display.description: Maximum number of messages to include in a single batch. Default: 100

display.label: Batch Request Byte Threshold
display.description: Maximum total size in bytes of messages in a single batch. Default: 9500000

display.label: Flow Control Enabled
display.description: Enable flow control to limit outstanding messages and bytes. Default: false

display.label: Max Outstanding Messages
display.description: Maximum number of outstanding messages allowed when flow control is enabled. Default: 9223372036854775807

display.label: Max Outstanding Bytes
display.description: Maximum total size in bytes of outstanding messages when flow control is enabled. Default: 9223372036854775807

display.label: Retry Total Timeout (ms)
display.description: Total timeout in milliseconds for retry attempts. Default: 60000

display.label: Retry Max RPC Timeout (ms)
display.description: Maximum RPC timeout in milliseconds for retry attempts. Default: 10000

display.label: Retry Initial Delay (ms)
display.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before first retry attempt. Default: 5

display.label: Retry Delay Multiplier
display.description: Multiplier for exponential backoff between retry attempts. Default: 2.0

display.label: Retry Max Delay (ms)
display.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds between retry attempts. Default: 9223372036854775807

display.label: Retry Initial RPC Timeout (ms)
display.description: Initial RPC timeout in milliseconds for retry attempts. Default: 10000

display.label: Retry RPC Timeout Multiplier
display.description: Multiplier for RPC timeout between retry attempts. Default: 2.0

display.label: Wait Message Delivery Timeout (ms)
display.description: Timeout in milliseconds to wait for message delivery confirmation. Default: 30000

display.label: Concurrency Threads
display.description: Number of threads for concurrent publishing. 0 means use default. Default: 0

display.label: Compression Threshold (bytes)
display.description: Minimum message size in bytes to enable compression. -1 disables compression. Default: -1

display.label: Channel Shutdown Timeout (ms)
display.description: Timeout in milliseconds for channel shutdown. Default: 30000

display.label: PubSub Endpoint Address
display.description: Optional PubSub endpoint address (for testing with emulator).

display.label: GCP Region
display.description: GCP region for regional endpoint (e.g., 'us-east1').
